역대하 10:1.content: Rehoboam went to Shechem; for all Israel had come to Shechem to make him king.

역대하 10:2.content: When Jeroboam the son of Nebat heard of it (for he was in Egypt, where he had fled from the presence of king Solomon), Jeroboam returned out of Egypt.

역대하 10:3.content: They sent and called him; and Jeroboam and all Israel came, and they spoke to Rehoboam, saying,

역대하 10:4.content: “Your father made our yoke grievous: now therefore make the grievous service of your father, and his heavy yoke which he put on us, lighter, and we will serve you.”

역대하 10:5.content: He said to them, “Come again to me after three days.” So the people departed.

역대하 10:6.content: King Rehoboam took counsel with the old men, who had stood before Solomon his father while he yet lived, saying, “What counsel do you give me about how to answer these people?”

역대하 10:7.content: They spoke to him, saying, “If you are kind to these people, please them, and speak good words to them, then they will be your servants forever.”

역대하 10:8.content: But he abandoned the counsel of the old men which they had given him, and took counsel with the young men who had grown up with him, who stood before him.

역대하 10:9.content: He said to them, “What counsel do you give, that we may give an answer to these people, who have spoken to me, saying, ‘Make the yoke that your father put on us lighter?’ ”

역대하 10:10.content: The young men who had grown up with him spoke to him, saying, “Thus you shall tell the people who spoke to you, saying, ‘Your father made our yoke heavy, but make it lighter on us;’ thus you shall say to them, ‘My little finger is thicker than my father’s waist.

역대하 10:11.content: Now whereas my father burdened you with a heavy yoke, I will add to your yoke. My father chastised you with whips, but I will chastise you with scorpions.’ ”

역대하 10:12.content: So Jeroboam and all the people came to Rehoboam the third day, as the king asked, saying, “Come to me again the third day.”

역대하 10:13.content: The king answered them roughly; and king Rehoboam abandoned the counsel of the old men,

역대하 10:14.content: and spoke to them after the counsel of the young men, saying, “My father made your yoke heavy, but I will add to it. My father chastised you with whips, but I will chastise you with scorpions.”

역대하 10:15.content: So the king didn’t listen to the people; for it was brought about by God, that Yahweh might establish his word, which he spoke by Ahijah the Shilonite to Jeroboam the son of Nebat.

역대하 10:16.content: When all Israel saw that the king didn’t listen to them, the people answered the king, saying, “What portion do we have in David? We don’t have an inheritance in the son of Jesse! Every man to your tents, Israel! Now see to your own house, David.” So all Israel departed to their tents.

역대하 10:17.content: But as for the children of Israel who lived in the cities of Judah, Rehoboam reigned over them.

역대하 10:18.content: Then king Rehoboam sent Hadoram, who was over the men subject to forced labor; and the children of Israel stoned him to death with stones. King Rehoboam hurried to get himself up to his chariot, to flee to Jerusalem.

역대하 10:19.content: So Israel rebelled against David’s house to this day.
